name: Randy Red Salsa Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the tomatoes and onion together until well combined.
2. Add all the remaining ingredients to the mixture and stir well.
3. Allow the salsa dip to stand for at least one hour before serving so the flavors can meld.
4. Serve the salsa dip at room temperature or chilled.
5. This recipe yields approximately 2 1/4 cups of salsa dip.
6. Suggested dippers: Potato skins, thick green bell pepper wedges, oysters, mushroom caps.
